case_title: ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR VS PROFESSIONAL MESSENGER SERVICE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL MESSENGER SERVICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR AS TO DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL MESSENGER SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL MESSENGER SERVICE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $71.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,071.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
